_INSTRUCTIONS: Add this schema to blog posts. Best approach: Configure in Yoast SEO settings or add via Code Snippets plugin. Yoast should auto-generate Article schema if 'Organization' is set as the publisher in Yoast > Settings > Site Representation. If it's not generating, check that Yoast 'Article' schema is enabled for Posts.
